title: UPI OC No 209 FY 24 25 – Guidelines on UPI features for UPI 123Pay
text:
NEED

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC-209/2024 October 25, 2024
To,
All UP! Members — Banks, PSPs and 123Pay Service Providers,

Dear Madam / Sir,

Subject: Guidelines on UPI features for UPI 123Pay

UPI 123Pay enables smart phone and feature phone users to digitally undertake a host of
transactions based on four approaches, including voice payment based via IVR number, proximity
sound-based payments, missed call-based payment approach, app-based scan and pay on
feature phone. NPCI developed Server-Side Common Library (SSCL) which is hosted at NPCI
end for enabling 123Pay transactions.

A reference is invited to press release issued by Reserve Bank of India (RBI), dated 9" October
2024 with Subject ‘Statement on Development and regulatory Policies’ whereby RBI has decided
to increase per transaction limit from %5,000 to 210,000 for UPI 123Pay.

. Members shall increase the per transaction limit to 10,000 from %5,000 with immediate effect.

2. Members shall implement Onboarding with Aadhar OTP in UPI 123Pay. Details as defined in
circular NPCI/UPI/OC-116/2021-22 and NPCI/UPI/OC-116A/2021-22 to be followed.

3. Members shall collectively identify and tag UPI 123Pay transactions as mentioned in
Annexure 1.

4. Members shall implement UPI Number functionality through integration with UPI numeric ID
Mapper. Details as defined in circular NPCI/UPI/OC-115/2021-22 to be followed.

5. New members shall comply to above mentioned guidelines for go live on UPI 123Pay

services.

Compliance Action:
All live 123Pay members are advised to comply before 1% January 2025.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10% Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.

ae T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101

eBuild Dad CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067


NEED

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

Annexure 1:

Identifiers for UPI 123Pay transactions.
a. Purpose Code

New purpose code 86 is issued for UPI 123Pay transactions. All 123Pay transactions should be
passed with purpose code 86 in the purpose="__" tag for financial and non-financial

transactions.
b. Initiation Mode

Initiation modes to be passed as per UPI Procedural guidelines. Earlier allotted Initiation mode =
‘31’ for 123Pay transactions as mentioned in NPCI/UPI/OC-133A/2022-23 shall be considered

null and void.
c. Initiating channel

The following initiating channel to be passed for respective 123Pay transactions.

On Call based <Tag name="TYPE" value="IVR"/>

Feature phone

2 ae FP <Tag name="TYPE" value="FP"/>
application based

3 Missed Call Based | MCP <Tag name="TYPE" value="MCP"/>
Sound frequency based | TONE <Tag name="TYPE" value="TONE"/>
